side pocket.quote: I love me some side pocket shots.

...into the side are wide and you can send it right to the middle of the pocket and have some room for error.
    
      The same wide-cut openings make the bank look like it's going into a 6-inch wide side pocket, even though it isn't, so the bank looks friend-shaped.

• Opponent tracking  
• Match history  
• Performance statistics  
• Multiple game types  
• Session notes and training logs

Railbird now does matchplay

Hey fam, just letting you know that railbird now does competition. New models detect which player is which (one of the most requested features). Record matches/league play and get your stats/video highlights split by player (all with just a phone). Thx for the community input - keeps us motivated and building.

Cheers,  
RB Team
